meta.description: quarTeT telomere-to-telomere genome assembly and characterization toolkit, including AssemblyMapper, GapFiller, TeloExplorer, CentroMiner, and the external aligner, tandem-repeat, BLAST, tidk, and R plotting dependencies used by those modules.

test: quartet --help | grep -F 'version 1.2.5' >/dev/null && quartet AssemblyMapper -h | grep -F 'REFERENCE_GENOME' >/dev/null && quartet GapFiller -h | grep -F 'DRAFT_GENOME' >/dev/null && quartet TeloExplorer -h | grep -F 'GENOME' >/dev/null && quartet CentroMiner -h | grep -F 'GENOME_FASTA' >/dev/null

micromamba list -p /opt/conda | grep -E 'minimap2[[:space:]]+2\.30' >/dev/null && micromamba list -p /opt/conda | grep -E 'mummer4[[:space:]]+4\.0\.1' >/dev/null && micromamba list -p /opt/conda | grep -E 'blast[[:space:]]+2\.16\.0' >/dev/null && micromamba list -p /opt/conda | grep -E 'tidk[[:space:]]+0\.2\.65' >/dev/null && micromamba list -p /opt/conda | grep -E 'r-rideogram[[:space:]]+0\.2\.2' >/dev/null && Rscript -e 'library(RIdeogram); library(ggplot2)' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-quartet-te && cd /tmp/taf-quartet-te && python3 -c 'seq="TTTAGGG"*200+"ACGT"*3000+"CCCTAAA"*200; open("genome.fa","w").write(">chr1\n"+seq+"\n")' && quartet TeloExplorer -i genome.fa -c plant -m 10 -p smoke --noplot >smoke.log 2>&1 && test -s smoke.telo.info && grep -F 'chr1' smoke.telo.info >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-quartet-am && cd /tmp/taf-quartet-am && python3 -c 'seq=("ACGTTGCAAGTCGATCGTACGATCGTAGCTAG"*20); open("ref.fa","w").write(">chr1
"+seq+"
"); open("ctg.fa","w").write(">ctg1
"+seq+"
")' && quartet AssemblyMapper -r ref.fa -q ctg.fa --nofilter -c 10 -l 50 -i 80 -p smoke -t 1 --noplot --teclade plant --teminrepeattimes 2 >smoke.log 2>&1 && test -s smoke.draftgenome.fasta && test -s smoke.draftgenome.agp && test -s smoke.contig.mapinfo && grep -F '>chr1' smoke.draftgenome.fasta >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-quartet-gf && cd /tmp/taf-quartet-gf && python3 -c 'import random; random.seed(7); dna="ACGT"; left="".join(random.choice(dna) for _ in range(1200)); fill="".join(random.choice(dna) for _ in range(120)); right="".join(random.choice(dna) for _ in range(1200)); open("draft.fa","w").write(">chr1
"+left+"N"*100+right+"
"); open("closer.fa","w").write(">read1
"+left+fill+right+"
")' && quartet GapFiller -d draft.fa -g closer.fa -f 800 -l 200 -i 80 -m 1000 -p smoke -t 1 --noplot >smoke.log 2>&1 && test -s smoke.genome.filled.fasta && test -s smoke.genome.filled.modified.agp && test -s smoke.genome.filled.detail && grep -F 'Closed' smoke.genome.filled.detail >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-quartet-cm && cd /tmp/taf-quartet-cm && python3 -c 'seq="ACGTAC"*100; open("genome.fa","w").write(">chr1\n"+seq+"\n")' && quartet CentroMiner -i genome.fa -n 2 -m 20 -l 20 -g 20 -t 1 -p smoke --trf 2 7 7 80 10 20 --noplot >smoke.log 2>&1 && test -d TandemRepeat && test -d Candidates && test -s TandemRepeat/smoke.chr1.tr.fasta

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-quartet-mummer && cd /tmp/taf-quartet-mummer && python3 -c 'seq=("ACGTTGCAAGTCGATCGTACGATCGTAGCTAG"*20); open("ref.fa","w").write(">chr1
"+seq+"
"); open("qry.fa","w").write(">qry1
"+seq+"
")' && nucmer -p smoke ref.fa qry.fa >/tmp/taf-quartet-mummer.log 2>&1 && delta-filter -m -q smoke.delta > smoke.filter.delta && show-coords -T -H smoke.filter.delta > smoke.coords && test -s smoke.coords

meta.summary: QUAST evaluates genome and metagenome assemblies with reference-aware metrics, no-reference summaries, MetaQUAST, QUAST-LG, and Icarus reports.
meta.description: QUAST evaluates genome and metagenome assemblies with reference-aware metrics, no-reference summaries, MetaQUAST, QUAST-LG, and Icarus reports.

test: metaquast.py --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'QUAST v5.3.0, c3eb988a (MetaQUAST mode)' >/dev/null && quast-lg.py --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'QUAST v5.3.0, c3eb988a (QUAST-LG mode)' >/dev/null && icarus.py --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'QUAST v5.3.0, c3eb988a' >/dev/null

quast.py --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Quality Assessment Tool for Genome Assemblies' >/dev/null && metaquast.py --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Quality Assessment Tool for Metagenome Assemblies' >/dev/null && quast-lg.py --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Quality Assessment Tool for Large Genome Assemblies' >/dev/null

test -x /opt/quast/quast_libs/minimap2/minimap2 && /opt/quast/quast_libs/minimap2/minimap2 --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx '2.28-r1209' >/dev/null && /opt/quast/quast_libs/bwa/bwa 2>&1 | grep -F 'Program: bwa' >/dev/null && /opt/quast/quast_libs/bedtools/bin/bedtools --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'bedtools' >/dev/null && test -x /opt/quast/quast_libs/glimmer/glimmerhmm && test -x /opt/quast/quast_libs/barrnap/bin/barrnap && test -x /opt/quast/quast_libs/sambamba/sambamba_linux

rm -rf /tmp/taf-quast-smoke && mkdir -p /tmp/taf-quast-smoke && quast.py --no-html --no-plots --no-icarus -t 1 -r /opt/quast/test_data/reference.fasta.gz -o /tmp/taf-quast-smoke/out /opt/quast/test_data/contigs_1.fasta >/tmp/taf-quast-smoke.log 2>&1 && test -s /tmp/taf-quast-smoke/out/report.txt && test -s /tmp/taf-quast-smoke/out/report.tsv && grep -F '# contigs' /tmp/taf-quast-smoke/out/report.tsv >/dev/null && grep -F 'Genome fraction (%)' /tmp/taf-quast-smoke/out/report.tsv >/dev/null
